summary: Taxonomy-mapping review is complete for the target repair candidate. The proposal is limited to candidate-change bookkeeping for a D+Q senolytics bone RCT repair, preserves the cellular_senescence, chronic_inflammation, stem_cell_exhaustion, and senolytics scope, and introduces no evidence-record taxonomy remapping.

findings.claim_or_issue: The target repair candidate proposes one candidate_change creation for its own review-lane tracking and one candidate_change update to keep the D+Q bone RCT extraction-refresh candidate in needs_revision.
findings.why_it_matters: Both proposed records remain within candidate-change metadata and preserve the same hallmarks and senolytics track, so the taxonomy labels are consistent with the bounded repair scope.
findings.recommended_action: No taxonomy-mapping revision is required for this lane.
